default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential investment opportunity and discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing platform.](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Harmony Partners, led by Clemens Baumgart, invests in B2B software companies, typically leading Series B rounds with flexible check sizes ($10-20M).](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [GrowthX has developed an advanced AI workflow engine for content creation, fact-checking, and research, addressing complex marketing challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli (GrowthX CEO) demonstrated the platform's capabilities, including automated workflows, human-in-the-loop processes, and API integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [GrowthX is considering fundraising in late summer (Aug/Sep) to scale their operations and capitalize on growing demand.](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Topics

### Harmony Partners Investment Strategy

  - [VC fund based in New York, investing since 2010 (currently on Fund 6)](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Focus: Early expansion rounds (typically Series B) in B2B software and tech-enabled businesses](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Check sizes: $10-20M, leading rounds of $15-40M](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Flexible approach to round construction and governance (board seats based on ownership %)](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Portfolio includes marketing tech companies like Drift, Iterable, Klaviyo, and recently acquired Offsite](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI-powered workflow engine for content creation, research, and marketing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Key features:](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Automated content generation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Research and data analysis capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Human-in-the-loop processes for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [API integrations and extensibility](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Use cases: SEO content, brand building, product launches, catalog enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### GrowthX Business Model and Traction

  - [Primary revenue from content creation services](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Notable clients: Hadtown.com, Allbirds founder's new venture, Engine.com](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Offering 4-8 week strategy sprints to set up client instances and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Aiming for 1:1 ratio of headcount costs to revenue for capital efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Breakeven status achieved in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Future Plans and Fundraising

  - [Considering fundraising round in August/September timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Goals: Scale operations, invest in 7 high-confidence product lanes](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Exploring new verticals like e-commerce catalog enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Building relationships with potential investors ahead of formal fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Clemens a brief overview of GrowthX for potential portfolio company introductions](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call in approximately one month to reassess timing and interest](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Explore potential in-person meeting during Inbound conference in San Francisco (September)](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Clemens to consider GrowthX for potential investment, pending further discussions and due diligence](https://fathom.video/share/tD1yZmV_4fdFqS4LY4iGoHCj7LyXLwA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
